steps.title: Find Cedar Cliff's advantage
steps.content: The student's goal is to explain an advantage of the Cedar Cliff House dwelling site. The relevant notes say Cedar Cliff House was built under a rock overhang and that the overhanging ledges protected the site from heavy rain and snow.

steps.title: Avoid neutral or wrong details
steps.content: The answer must name that specific benefit, not merely identify Cedar Cliff House or give unrelated facts. A says there was an advantage but does not explain it, B gives only location and dates, and C incorrectly assigns Mesa House's flat-terrain advantage to Cedar Cliff House. The answer is D.
